commands.repair_reason: The remaining action is contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus maintainer handling of Vercel authorization and fail-closed policy impact, not an automation-repairable code defect.; Cleared: The diff narrows a moderation/ownership bypass and does not add dependencies, CI changes, secret handling, publishing changes, or broader code execution surface. (sha=c7bd6726d76635217cc0aa376b638756eccd2426)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds moderation-state guards to direct and accepted skill ownership transfers, regression tests, a changelog entry, and an ownership-transfer spec note.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows direct owner transfer reaches ownership writes without a moderation guard, while accepted transfers miss active suspicious signals before the owner write path.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus maintainer handling of Vercel authorization and fail-closed policy impact, not an automation-repairable code defect.

target.title: fix: block direct skill transfers under moderation
target.body:
## Summary

Blocks skill ownership transfers while the skill is under moderation or otherwise unavailable.

## What changed

- Direct owner moves are rejected when a skill is hidden, removed, suspicious, or malicious.
- Accepted pending-transfer flows run the same moderation guard before writing the new owner.
- Permission checks still happen before moderation-state checks so unauthorized users do not learn hidden/moderation state.

## Public behavior

Direct transfers and accepted pending transfers fail explicitly when the skill is under moderation. They do not silently move ownership while the skill is hidden, removed, suspicious, or malicious.

Unauthorized actors are still rejected before moderation state is revealed.

## Behavior proof

Focused terminal proof from both ownership-transfer paths:

```text
$ vitest run convex/skillTransfers.test.ts convex/skills.ownership.test.ts --reporter verbose --testNamePattern "rejects direct owner transfers for skills under moderation|checks direct transfer permissions before revealing moderation state|acceptTransferInternal rejects skills under moderation before ownership writes|acceptTransferInternal cancels transfer when skill is under moderation"

✓ convex/skillTransfers.test.ts > skillTransfers > acceptTransferInternal rejects skills under moderation before ownership writes
✓ convex/skillTransfers.test.ts > skillTransfers > acceptTransferInternal cancels transfer when skill is under moderation
✓ convex/skills.ownership.test.ts > skills ownership > rejects direct owner transfers for skills under moderation
✓ convex/skills.ownership.test.ts > skills ownership > checks direct transfer permissions before revealing moderation state

Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  4 passed | 12 skipped (16)
```

Full focused suite also passed:

```text
$ bun run test convex/skillTransfers.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       9 passed (9)
```

## Validation

```text
$ bun run ci:static
passed
```

```text
$ bun run ci:unit
Test Files  204 passed (204)
Tests       1988 passed (1988)
Statements  85.98%
Branches    75.17%
Functions   86.37%
Lines        89.48%
```

```text
$ bun run ci:types-build
tsc, package typechecks, clawhub-mod typecheck, Vite build, and Nitro build passed.
```
target.author: vyctorbrzezowski
